Adjust the opacity if needed to better s: Veisautaka na opacity kevaka e gadrevi me raica vinaka cake na veitikina e ra.

Are you sure you want to start over and: O vinakata dina mo tekivuna tale ka droinitaka tale na nomu droini?
Calculations are queued and should start: Na iwiliwili e queued ka dodonu me tekivu ena dua na gauna lekaleka.
Calculations will start once overlay lay: Ena tekivu na vakasama ena gauna e sa vakayacori kina na veitiki ni overlay.

Digitaka e dua na droini mo wasea...
created this sketch on: a bulia na droini oqo ena
Downsampled cells are displayed, roughly: E vakaraitaki na sela vakalailaitaki, rauta ni tautauvata kei na dua na <2> </2> na grid vakababa. Zoom me raica na sela ni vakatulewa taucoko.
Finish using the measurement tool before: Vakacavara na vakayagataki ni iyaya ni vakarautaki ni bera ni tomani na droini.
Full resolution cells are being shown, r: E vakaraitaki tiko na sela ni vakatulewa taucoko, rauta ni tautauvata kei na dua na <2> </2> na grid vakababa.

Please complete your geometry first: Yalovinaka vakacavara na nomu geometry taumada
Yalovinaka vakalewena taumada na nomu vakau.
Processing your sketch. This should only: Cakacakataka na nomu droini. Oqo e dodonu me taura ga e dua na gauna.
Results are calculated when a sketch is: Na kena isau e vakarautaki ena gauna e buli kina se vakavoutaki e dua na droini. E rawa ni wasei na veimataqali me rawa ni vakamacalataki kina na veicurumaki ni antimeridian se veicoqacoqa kei na so tale na droini ena dua na isoqoni.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: SeaSketch e bulia na veitiki ni vakavinakataki me baleta na kena vakayacori totolo. Oqo e gadrevi ga me vakatuburi vakadua, se ena gauna cava ga e vakavoutaki kina e dua na ivurevure ni tabana.
Select cells where this property is: Digitaka na sela e tiko kina na iyau oqo .
Select one or more options to limit cell: Digitaka e dua se sivia na digidigi me vakaiyalayala na sela vei ira era veiganiti na kena isau. Kevaka e sega ni dua na digidigi e caka, ena sega ni vakayagataki na filter oqo.
SignInToSketch: Yalovinaka <2>sign in</2> se <6>buca e dua na akaude</6> mo tekivu bulia na sketches.
There was a problem calculating metrics: E tiko e dua na leqa ni kena vakarautaki na metrics me baleta na kadi oqo.
These metrics are calculated in order to: Na metrics oqo e vakarautaki me rawa ni vakarautaki kina na stats yaga me vaka na pasede ni veivakacokotaki. Me vaka na veitiki ni optimized, era sa vakarautaki tale ga kevaka e vakavoutaki e dua na ivurevure ni veitiki.

Kiliki me vakarabailevutaki.
Use the sliders above to filter between: Vakayagataka na sliders e cake me vakasavasavataki ena maliwa ni dua na ilawalawa ni isau ena histogram, se vakarautaka na isau dodonu ena veivakacurumi e ra.
View Attributes and Reports: Raica na iTovo kei na Ripote
Wait until processing is complete: Wawa me yacova ni sa vakacavari na cakacaka
What would you like to name your folder?: Na cava o na via vakayacana na nomu folder?
